headline: Palantir and NVIDIA Team to Deliver Sovereign AI Operating System Reference Architecture
summary: MIAMI, March 12, 2026--Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced its sovereign AI OS reference architecture with NVIDIA, which delivers customers a turnkey AI datacenter from hardware procurement to application deployment.

content.summary: MIAMI, March 12, 2026--Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced its sovereign AI OS reference architecture with NVIDIA, which delivers customers a turnkey AI datacenter from hardware procurement to application deployment.

headline: GE Aerospace and Palantir Expand Partnership to Transform Military Aircraft Readiness with AI
summary: MIAMI & AURORA, Colo., March 12, 2026--GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) and Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) today announced a multi-year partnership expansion to accelerate the transformation of military aviation readiness for the U.S. Air Force and operations across GE Aerospace’s production system. Together, the companies are deploying advanced agentic AI-powered solutions to ensure GE can maximize production and aircraft remain mission ready.

content.title: GE Aerospace and Palantir Expand Partnership to Transform Military Aircraft Readiness with AI
content.summary: MIAMI & AURORA, Colo., March 12, 2026--GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) and Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) today announced a multi-year partnership expansion to accelerate the transformation of military aviation readiness for the U.S. Air Force and operations across GE Aerospace’s production system. Together, the companies are deploying advanced agentic AI-powered solutions to ensure GE can maximize production and aircraft remain mission ready.

headline: Centrus Partners with Palantir to Drive Cost Savings and Unlock Operational Efficiencies in Major Expansion of U.S. Uranium Enrichment Capacity
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR), a leading provider of AI systems and enterprise operating systems, and Centrus Energy (NYSE: LEU), the U.S. company leading the effort to restore America's ability to enrich uranium at commercial scale, today announced a landmark partnership that will apply Palantir's AI-driven software tools in support of Centrus' multi-billion-dollar expansion of its uranium enrichment capacity. headline: Palantir And LG CNS Expand AI Partnership To Deepen Industrial Footprint
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) and LG CNS expanded their partnership to roll out AI and data platforms across the wider LG Group. The agreement targets group wide digital transformation across manufacturing, energy, electronics, and logistics operations. A dedicated joint engineering team will focus on deploying and scaling Palantir’s AI solutions within LG’s global businesses. Palantir shares recently closed at $151.6, with the stock up 81.2% over the past year and delivering a very...

headline: Palantir Is Down 27% — Is This a Collapse or a Buying Opportunity?
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) is trading around $152 in premarket hours this Thursday morning. Currently, shares sit roughly 27% below the 52-week high of $207.52. That’s a meaningful haircut for a company that just posted one of the most impressive earnings quarters in its history. The gap between Palantir’s business fundamentals and the stock price is ... headline: UiPath Stock Sinks 6% — But It Could Still Be the Next Palantir
summary: UiPath (NYSE:PATH) declined approximately 6% in today’s session, trading below $12 midday on Thursday. The selloff is puzzling on the surface. UiPath just posted a quarter that beat expectations on every major metric and crossed a profitability threshold it had never crossed before. The stock is now down 29% year-to-date. headline: GE Aerospace Deepens Palantir AI Use In Defense And Factory Operations
summary: GE Aerospace, part of General Electric (NYSE:GE), has expanded a multi year partnership with Palantir Technologies to roll out advanced AI solutions across the U.S. Air Force. The partnership now covers mission readiness, sustainment and new engine production systems, with a focus on supply chain and maintenance automation. AI agents are being used to support decision making in aircraft sustainment and to streamline GE Aerospace's own production processes. For you as an investor, this...

headline: Microsoft, Palantir Are Selling At 'Garage Sale Prices,' Says Dan Ives As AI Monetization Takes Center Stage
